content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Amendment fr-13-2890d3b9 proposes forcing milestone Failed state on the normal failed-run sync path, but MilestoneStatus::Failed is terminal (no transitions, record_bead_start rejects new beads), which would break the existing run resume path that accepts RunStatus::Failed and starts new beads. The current Paused parking is intentional for resumability. Amendment fr-13-40ea497d identifies a genuine reconciliation ordering bug: the else-if chain in reconcile_snapshot_from_lineage short-circuits on Paused before evaluating completion conditions, permanently trapping fully-completed milestones in Paused. The bridge synthesis machinery (Paused→Running→Completed) exists but is never triggered.

## Votes

- `fr-13-2890d3b9`: Reject
  MilestoneStatus::Failed is terminal with zero allowed transitions (model.rs:80-103), and record_bead_start guards against starting beads on terminal milestones (service.rs:1840-1846). The run resume command accepts RunStatus::Failed (run.rs:608) and calls sync_milestone_bead_start which invokes record_bead_start — so marking milestones Failed on the normal sync path would cause resumed runs to hit the terminal guard and fail with RunStartFailed. The current ReconcileFromLineage → Paused behavior is intentional to preserve resumability. The amendment correctly identifies that Running→Failed is unreachable on this path, but forcing it without adding a safe milestone reopen mechanism is not a standalone fix — it would break an existing, tested workflow.
- `fr-13-40ea497d`: Accept
  The else-if chain in reconcile_snapshot_from_lineage (service.rs:983-991) has a genuine ordering defect: the Paused branch at line 983 executes and short-circuits before the completion condition check at line 985 can evaluate. When the last in-flight bead completes successfully on a Paused milestone (completed_beads + skipped_beads >= total_beads, no active bead, no failed beads), the snapshot remains Paused indefinitely. The bridge synthesis in build_reconciled_transition_events (lines 802-804) already supports Paused→Running→Completed transitions, but it is never triggered because the snapshot status never changes to Completed. The fix — checking completion conditions within or before the Paused branch — is safe and uses existing transition machinery. The test paused_milestone_stays_paused_when_completion_reconciles_lineage locks in this buggy behavior and should be updated to expect Completed.
